items.example: I avoid buying designer brands because I think they're overpriced.
I drive a small car which is very economical on fuel.
We do our food shopping together because it's more cost-effective.
I never eat out in pricey restaurants.
I always keep an eye out for complimentary tickets to shows.
I try to find things that are discounted, for example in the sales.
I'm trying to save money by cooking at home instead of eating out.
I can't afford to buy a new car right now.
This jacket was a real bargain — I got it for half price.
The hotel was expensive but it was definitely worth the money.
